name: responsive-ui-inputs
description: Validate safe-area Hero HUD, functional menu surfaces, touch controls, and input bindings.

args.code: local H=game:GetService('HttpService') local p=game.Players.LocalPlayer local g=p.PlayerGui.PunchWallHUD local h=g.PixelPerfectHeroCityHUD local cas=game:GetService('ContextActionService') local b=cas:GetAllBoundActionInfo() return H:JSONEncode({safeInsets=g.ScreenInsets==Enum.ScreenInsets.DeviceSafeInsets,safeCompatibility=g.SafeAreaCompatibility==Enum.SafeAreaCompatibility.FullscreenExtension,clipSafe=g.ClipToDeviceSafeArea,rank=h:FindFirstChild('DepthRankHUD')~=nil,objective=h:FindFirstChild('TutorialObjectiveHUD')~=nil,stats=h:FindFirstChild('PowerCard')~=nil and h:FindFirstChild('CoinsCard')~=nil and h:FindFirstChild('WallCard')~=nil,menu=g:FindFirstChild('GameMenu')~=nil,punch=h:FindFirstChild('ActionPunch')~=nil,jump=h:FindFirstChild('ActionJump')~=nil,gauntlet=p.Character:FindFirstChild('Equipped Kaiju Gauntlet')~=nil,punchBinding=b.KaijuPunch~=nil,trainBinding=b.KaijuTrain~=nil,useBinding=b.KaijuUse~=nil,menuBinding=b.KaijuMenu~=nil})

steps.label: safe responsive HUD and inputs exist

args.code: local H=game:GetService('HttpService') local g=game.Players.LocalPlayer.PlayerGui.PunchWallHUD g.GameMenu.Visible=true game.ReplicatedStorage.PunchWallEvents.ActionRequest:FireServer({action='RequestSync'}) task.wait(.25) local tabs=g.GameMenu.Tabs local content=g.GameMenu.Content return H:JSONEncode({visible=g.GameMenu.Visible,fists=tabs:FindFirstChild('FistsTab')~=nil,pets=tabs:FindFirstChild('PetsTab')~=nil,tasks=tabs:FindFirstChild('TasksTab')~=nil,settings=tabs:FindFirstChild('SettingsTab')~=nil,rows=#content:GetChildren()>=3})
